Title: Display 'Broken Page' widget in dashboard
Preconditions:
1. Admin user logged into vcst-qa environment
2. User has access to B2B-store
3. Browser cache and local storage cleared
4. Console is open for monitoring
Steps:
1. Navigate to Admin panel (https://vcst-qa.govirto.com)
2. Login with admin credentials (admin/Password3)
3. Navigate to Stores section
4. Click on B2B-store
5. Verify 'Active broken links' widget is visible on store dashboard
Expected Result:
1. 'Active broken links' widget should be visible on dashboard
2. Widget should display current count of active broken links
3. Widget should be clickable to access broken links grid
4. No console errors should be present
Actual Result:
✅ Widget displayed correctly showing '5' active broken links
✅ Widget properly styled and positioned
✅ Click functionality working
✅ No console errors detected

Title: Widget opens scoped Broken Page grid
Preconditions:
1. C406875 test case passed
2. 'Active broken links' widget is visible
3. Admin user has appropriate permissions
Steps:
1. Click on 'Active broken links' widget
2. Wait for grid to load
3. Verify grid opens with broken links data
4. Verify grid shows appropriate columns (Permalink, Status, Hit count)
5. Check that grid is scoped to current store
Expected Result:
1. Grid should open successfully
2. Grid should display broken links data
3. Columns should include: Permalink, Status, Hit count
4. Data should be scoped to B2B-store only
5. Grid should show total count of items
Actual Result:
✅ Grid opened successfully showing 11 broken links
✅ All required columns present and functional
✅ Data properly scoped to B2B-store
✅ Grid showing correct item count
✅ No console errors

5. Selection state should be maintained
Actual Result:

✅ Multi-select functionality working correctly
✅ Selection state maintained properly

Title: Search functionality
Preconditions:
1. C406876 test case passed
2. Broken links grid is open with data
3. Search box is visible and accessible
Steps:
1. Locate search keyword textbox
2. Enter search term 'fake' in search box
3. Press Enter or trigger search
4. Verify results are filtered

Expected Result:

2. Search should filter results based on keyword
3. Only matching entries should be displayed
4. Item count should update to reflect filtered results

Actual Result:

✅ Search functionality working perfectly

Title: Status filtering/management functionality
Preconditions:
1. C406876 test case passed
2. Broken links grid is open
3. At least one broken link entry is available for testing
Steps:
1. Click on a broken link row to open details
2. Locate Status dropdown field
3. Click on Status dropdown
4. Verify all status options are available (Active, Resolved, Accepted)
5. Select 'Resolved' status
6. Save changes
Expected Result:
1. Broken link detail view should open
2. Status dropdown should be accessible
3. All three status options should be available
4. Status change should be successful
5. Changes should be saved and reflected in grid
Actual Result:
✅ Broken link detail opened successfully
✅ Status dropdown accessible and functional
✅ All status options available (Active, Resolved, Accepted)
✅ Status changed from 'Active' to 'Resolved'
✅ Changes saved successfully

Expected Result:
1. Redirect URL field should accept input
2. URL should be validated and formatted correctly
3. Save operation should complete successfully
4. URL should be stored in system
5. Grid should reflect updated information
Actual Result:
✅ Redirect URL entered successfully
✅ URL automatically cleaned/optimized to '/catalog'
✅ Save operation completed successfully
✅ Changes reflected in system
✅ Grid updated with new information

Title: Frontend 404 page detection
Preconditions:
1. Frontend URL accessible (https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com)
2. Known broken link '/not-found' exists in system
3. Browser console is open for monitoring
Steps:
1. Navigate to frontend URL
2. Access broken link: https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/not-found
3. Verify 404 page is displayed
4. Check page title and content
5. Verify proper 404 page structure
Expected Result:
1. 404 page should be displayed for broken links
2. Page title should indicate '404 Page not found'
3. Proper error message should be shown
4. Navigation options should be provided
5. Page should maintain site structure
Actual Result:
✅ 404 page displayed correctly
✅ Page title: 'QA & 404 Page not found'
✅ Proper error message: 'Page not found'
✅ Home page link provided for navigation
✅ Site header/footer maintained

Title: Frontend redirect functionality
Preconditions:
1. C406881 test case passed
2. Broken link has been configured with redirect URL
3. Frontend is accessible
Steps:
1. Navigate to broken link with configured redirect (/fake)
2. Verify automatic redirect occurs
3. Check final destination URL
4. Verify page loads correctly
5. Confirm redirect is seamless
Expected Result:
1. Broken link should automatically redirect
2. User should reach configured destination page
3. Redirect should be immediate and seamless
4. Destination page should load fully
5. No 404 error should be visible to user
Actual Result:
✅ Automatic redirect from '/fake' to '/catalog'
✅ Destination page loaded correctly
✅ Redirect was immediate and seamless
✅ Full catalog page functionality working
✅ No 404 error visible to users

Expected Result:

2. Final URL should be correct
3. Contacts page should load with full functionality
4. Page title should reflect correct destination
5. Complete admin-to-frontend workflow validated
Actual Result:

✅ Final URL: https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/contacts
✅ Contacts page loaded with full functionality
✅ Page title: 'QA & Contacts'
✅ Complete workflow validated successfully

Title: Hit count tracking validation
Preconditions:
1. Previous frontend tests completed
2. Admin dashboard accessible
3. Broken links grid contains hit count data
Steps:
1. Access admin dashboard and navigate to broken links grid
2. Note current hit count for 'not-found' broken link
3. Navigate to frontend and access /not-found URL
4. Return to admin dashboard
5. Verify hit count has been updated
Expected Result:
1. Initial hit count should be recorded
2. Frontend visit should be tracked
3. Hit count should increment after visit
4. Admin dashboard should reflect updated count
5. Tracking should be real-time and accurate
Actual Result:
✅ Initial hit count recorded (7 hits)
✅ Frontend visit to /not-found completed
✅ Hit count tracking working accurately
✅ Admin dashboard reflects current data
✅ Real-time tracking system functional
